languages.text: "Я приду, и очень надеюсь, что реликвия действительно стоит моего внимания".
"I shall come, and I truly hope this relic is indeed worth my attention."
languages.original_text: "Я приду, и очень надеюсь, что реликвия действительно стоит моего внимания".

traits.locale_text: "I shall come, and I truly hope the relic is indeed worth my attention."
"I shall come, and I truly hope the relic is indeed worth my attention."
"I shall come, and I truly hope this relic is indeed worth my attention."
"I shall come, and I truly hope this relic is indeed worth my attention."

languages.text: “我会去的，而且我真心希望这件圣物值得我费心。”
languages.original_text: "I shall come, and I truly hope this relic is indeed worth my attention."

traits.locale_text: “我会去的，而且我真心希望这件圣物值得我费心。”

languages.text: «Acudiré, y más vale que esta reliquia sea digna de mi atención».
languages.original_text: "I shall come, and I truly hope this relic is indeed worth my attention."

traits.locale_text: «Acudiré, y más vale que esta reliquia sea digna de mi atención».

languages.text: « Je vais venir, et cette relique a tout intérêt à être digne de mon attention. »
languages.original_text: "I shall come, and I truly hope this relic is indeed worth my attention."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais venir, et cette relique a tout intérêt à être digne de mon attention. »

languages.text: "Ich werde kommen und hoffe sehr, dieses Relikt ist meiner Aufmerksamkeit würdig."
languages.original_text: "I shall come, and I truly hope this relic is indeed worth my attention."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde kommen und hoffe sehr, dieses Relikt ist meiner Aufmerksamkeit würdig."

languages.text: "Geleceğim. Umarım bu yadigâr gerçekten de ilgime değerdir."
languages.original_text: "I shall come, and I truly hope this relic is indeed worth my attention."

traits.locale_text: "Geleceğim. Umarım bu yadigâr gerçekten de ilgime değerdir."

languages.text: 「私は参ります。この遺物に本当に注目する価値があることを願っています。」
languages.original_text: "I shall come, and I truly hope this relic is indeed worth my attention."

traits.locale_text: 「私は参ります。この遺物に本当に注目する価値があることを願っています。」
